title: eupatorium purpureum var. maculatum
intro: Eupatorium purpureum var. maculatum, also known as the spotted joe-pye weed, is a variety of the Eupatorium purpureum plant, which is a flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Eupatorium purpureum var. maculatum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Eupatorium purpureum var. maculatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
